title: Blue (disambiguation)
content:
'''Blue''' could refer to the following:

[[File:Aayla_TCW.png|thumb|right|250px|[[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] [[Aayla Secura/Legends|Aayla Secura]], a blue-skinned [[Rutian/Legends|Rutian]] [[Twi'lek/Legends|Twi'lek]] who fought with a blue-bladed [[Lightsaber/Legends|lightsaber]]]]
